wisp_of_memory.name: Wisp of Memory
wisp_of_memory.description: A translucent spirit that flickers between existence and memory, carrying fragments of forgotten knowledge.

echo_guardian.name: Echo Guardian
echo_guardian.description: A shadowy figure that protects the sacred chambers, formed from the echoes of ancient protectors.

crystal_spider.name: Crystal Spider
crystal_spider.description: A magnificent arachnid whose body is formed entirely of living crystal, refracting light in beautiful patterns.

gem_golem.name: Gem Golem
gem_golem.description: A hulking construct made of various precious stones, its eyes glowing with inner fire.

prismatic_bat.name: Prismatic Bat
prismatic_bat.description: A bat whose wings split light into rainbow patterns, creating dazzling displays as it flies.

garden_sprite.name: Garden Sprite
garden_sprite.description: A tiny humanoid creature with butterfly wings, tending to the magical plants with loving care.

thorn_guardian.name: Thorn Guardian
thorn_guardian.description: A plant-like creature covered in razor-sharp thorns, fiercely protective of its garden domain.

floating_jellyfish.name: Floating Jellyfish
floating_jellyfish.description: A translucent creature that drifts through the air like it was water, trailing luminous tentacles.

marsh_wraith.name: Marsh Wraith
marsh_wraith.description: A ghostly figure that rises from the dark waters, its form shifting between solid and ethereal.

shadow_frog.name: Shadow Frog
shadow_frog.description: A large amphibian that seems to be made of living shadow, croaking with otherworldly sounds.

will_o_wisp.name: Will-o-Wisp
will_o_wisp.description: A dancing light that leads travelers astray, flickering between dimensions.

wind_elemental.name: Wind Elemental
wind_elemental.description: A swirling vortex of air given consciousness, constantly shifting and reforming.

storm_hawk.name: Storm Hawk
storm_hawk.description: A magnificent bird whose feathers crackle with electricity, riding the eternal winds.

cloud_sheep.name: Cloud Sheep
cloud_sheep.description: A fluffy creature that appears to be made of solid cloud, grazing on crystallized air.

fire_salamander.name: Fire Salamander
fire_salamander.description: A lizard-like creature that swims through lava as easily as water, its scales glowing like embers.

forge_golem.name: Forge Golem
forge_golem.description: A massive construct of metal and fire, eternally working at the cosmic forges.

ember_sprite.name: Ember Sprite
ember_sprite.description: A tiny being of pure flame that dances through the forges, bringing life to the fires.

knowledge_seeker.name: Knowledge Seeker
knowledge_seeker.description: A robed figure whose face is hidden in shadow, eternally searching for forbidden knowledge.

paper_dragon.name: Paper Dragon
paper_dragon.description: A dragon made entirely of animated parchment and ink, breathing words instead of fire.

bookworm.name: Bookworm
bookworm.description: A massive worm that feeds on knowledge itself, leaving trails of glowing text in its wake.

lightning_elemental.name: Lightning Elemental
lightning_elemental.description: A being of pure electrical energy, crackling and sparking with barely contained power.

thunder_bird.name: Thunder Bird
thunder_bird.description: A massive bird whose wingbeats create thunder, soaring through the storm-wreathed peaks.

storm_cloud.name: Storm Cloud
storm_cloud.description: A sentient cloud that rains constantly, its mood affecting the weather around it.

void_walker.name: Void Walker
void_walker.description: A being that exists between realities, its form constantly shifting between dimensions.
void_walker.presenceVerb: flickers in and out of reality

reality_worm.name: Reality Worm
reality_worm.description: A massive creature that burrows through the fabric of existence itself.

null_entity.name: Null Entity
null_entity.description: A creature that exists by not existing, visible only by the absence it creates.

star_guardian.name: Star Guardian
star_guardian.description: A celestial being that watches over the cosmic observatory, its body made of condensed starlight.

cosmic_horror.name: Cosmic Horror
cosmic_horror.description: An incomprehensible entity from the spaces between stars, its true form hidden from mortal perception.

nebula_wisp.name: Nebula Wisp
nebula_wisp.description: A gentle creature made of cosmic dust and gas, drifting peacefully through the observatory.

arcane_sentinel.name: Arcane Sentinel
arcane_sentinel.description: A powerful guardian created by the Archmages themselves, radiating immense magical power.

mage_shade.name: Mage Shade
mage_shade.description: The ghostly remnant of a powerful wizard, still practicing magic in death.

living_spell.name: Living Spell
living_spell.description: A spell that has gained consciousness and independence, existing as pure magical energy.

shattered_sentinel.name: Shattered Sentinel
shattered_sentinel.description: A soldier-husk half-assembled from cracked armor and administrative ash. It keeps trying to salute a commander who was deleted in the Sundering.
shattered_sentinel.presenceVerb: grinds broken metal in a ruined salute

discordant_note.name: Discordant Note
discordant_note.description: A shard of sound that slipped out of tune with reality. It hurts to look at and worse to hear.
discordant_note.presenceVerb: wavers on a note that doesn't exist

valdris_shadow_self.name: Valdris's Shadow-Self
valdris_shadow_self.description: A black mirror of Valdris, trailing ink where light should be. It fights with the same patience, but none of the restraint.
valdris_shadow_self.presenceVerb: holds its blade at an impossible angle

ash_revenant.name: Ash Revenant
ash_revenant.description: A figure of compacted ash wearing the memory of armor. Its eyes are the last glowing coals of something once brave.

null_signal.name: Null-Signal
null_signal.description: A silhouette shaped like a person but containing no data. Looking at it feels like trying to read an empty variable.

stray_code_wisp.name: Stray Code Wisp
stray_code_wisp.description: A glowing fragment of orphaned logic, drifting in search of a function to belong to.

binary_drifter.name: Binary Drifter
binary_drifter.description: A humanoid outline flickering between 0 and 1, unable to commit to existing.

regret_echo.name: Regret Echo
regret_echo.description: A silhouette of someone who almost made the right choice. It lunges with the weight of every apology it never delivered.
regret_echo.presenceVerb: watches with the eyes of every decision you have made

scholar_shade.name: Scholar Shade
scholar_shade.description: A translucent figure bent over an invisible book. Still annotating a text that was never written.

paper_gryphon.name: Paper Gryphon
paper_gryphon.description: A gryphon folded entirely from library pages - razor-edged and extremely offended by the existence of errata.

footnote_phantom.name: Footnote Phantom
footnote_phantom.description: A small, nervous ghost that exists only in the margin of things. It attacks by quoting you out of context.

recursive_copy.name: Recursive Copy
recursive_copy.description: An imperfect clone of something that no longer exists. Each time you look away it splits, badly.
recursive_copy.presenceVerb: exists more than once at once

paradox_loop.name: Paradox Loop
paradox_loop.description: A ribbon of geometry that keeps meeting itself coming back. Touching it gives you a mild concussion and a moderate headache.

glitch_hound.name: Glitch-Hound
glitch_hound.description: A hound whose model is corrupted - front legs in last tick's position, rear legs in next tick's. The snarl arrives before the mouth does.

echo_self.name: Echo of the Self
echo_self.description: An imperfect copy of you, wearing your face at a weight you have never felt. It fights with every move you've ever made.
echo_self.presenceVerb: wears the memory of your face

shadow_archivist.name: Shadow Archivist
shadow_archivist.description: A quiet figure cataloguing every mistake it has ever witnessed. Its favorite section is yours.

weeping_mask.name: Weeping Mask
weeping_mask.description: A porcelain mask hovering in still air, leaking slow silver tears that burn where they land.

corruption_beast.name: Corruption Beast
corruption_beast.description: A mass of corrupted geometry with teeth in places teeth have no business being. It smells faintly of magnetic tape.

memory_leak.name: Memory Leak
memory_leak.description: A slowly expanding cloud of unreleased memory, growing every second it is observed. It has forgotten how to be released.

clockwork_inquisitor.name: Clockwork Inquisitor
clockwork_inquisitor.description: A brass and bone figure with a ticking chest. It asks one question, over and over: 'Are you sure?'

tempus_wraith.name: Tempus Wraith
tempus_wraith.description: A smear of time in the shape of a person. It strikes first, then decides to attack.

logic_sphinx.name: Logic Sphinx
logic_sphinx.description: A statue of cold stone that judges every syllogism you have ever formed. Its riddles are not fair.

patched_pedestrian.name: Patched Pedestrian
patched_pedestrian.description: A commuter in a raincoat that renders at half resolution. Their face buffers when you look directly at it. They check a phone that has no screen.
patched_pedestrian.presenceVerb: waits at a crosswalk that isn't there

baggage_claim_beast.name: Baggage-Claim Beast
baggage_claim_beast.description: A suitcase that has been waiting on the carousel long enough to develop opinions. It has grown legs. Two of them are handles. The wheels work.

expired_traveler.name: Expired Traveler
expired_traveler.description: A ghost in airport business-casual, clutching a boarding pass for a flight that was cancelled before the realm was spun up. They just want to know where Gate 7 is.
expired_traveler.presenceVerb: checks a watch that is thirty years slow

neon_yakuza.name: Neon Yakuza
neon_yakuza.description: A figure in a coat of licensed rain, lit by a sign advertising a noodle bar that closed in Q3. The tattoos on their arms are under non-disclosure agreements.
neon_yakuza.presenceVerb: leans in a doorway, smoking something expensive

rogue_replicant.name: Rogue Replicant
rogue_replicant.description: An off-the-books synthetic, past their retirement certificate by a cruel margin. They fight like someone who has read the manual and disagreed with it.
rogue_replicant.presenceVerb: watches you the way a camera does

bazaar_cutpurse.name: Bazaar Cutpurse
bazaar_cutpurse.description: A narrow figure in a coat of pockets. Their fingers move faster than their rendering can keep up with, which is both the problem and the pitch.
bazaar_cutpurse.presenceVerb: palms something that wasn't theirs a moment ago

noodle_vendor_aggro.name: Disgruntled Noodle Vendor
noodle_vendor_aggro.description: A stallkeeper whose soup has been stolen one too many times. The cleaver is for the noodles, technically. The aim is for you.

movementVerbs.arrive: steps out from behind the counter

noodle_vendor_aggro.presenceVerb: glares over a pot of simmering broth

corporate_enforcer.name: Corporate Enforcer
corporate_enforcer.description: Six feet of compliance in a pressed suit, with a lanyard that gets you fired just by looking at it. Their badge has more permissions than you do.
corporate_enforcer.presenceVerb: stands in the middle of the corridor like a policy

flickering_janitor.name: Flickering Janitor
flickering_janitor.description: A cleaner whose shift ended some years ago; nobody told his texture pack. He mops floors that are already clean, in rooms that are already dark.
flickering_janitor.presenceVerb: mops the same square of floor, indefinitely

junior_associate.name: Junior Associate
junior_associate.description: A suit three sizes too eager, armed with a clipboard of escalations and a smile that has never worked from home. They bill in six-minute increments.
junior_associate.presenceVerb: checks their watch and then yours

data_ghost.name: Data Ghost
data_ghost.description: The silhouette of a user who was soft-deleted but never unlinked. Their attacks carry the weight of outstanding tickets from every queue they ever opened.
data_ghost.presenceVerb: hovers in the cold aisle, offline-ish

security_subroutine.name: Security Subroutine
security_subroutine.description: An on-call daemon shaped like a man shaped like a sentence. It enforces the rules it has been told about, ruthlessly, and escalates the ones it hasn't.

movementVerbs.arrive: spawns in response to an alarm

security_subroutine.presenceVerb: scans the room on a tight loop

memory_leak_wraith.name: Memory Leak Wraith
memory_leak_wraith.description: A fog of unreleased allocations wearing the outline of the engineer who shipped it. Every second you observe it, it grows. The docs say this is intended behaviour.
memory_leak_wraith.presenceVerb: occupies more space than it should

queue_fragment.name: Queue Fragment
queue_fragment.description: A detached segment of The Queue, flopping around the concourse looking for a line to rejoin. It has a number. The number has never been called.
queue_fragment.presenceVerb: waits, even though no one is serving

offworld_recruiter.name: Off-World Recruiter
offworld_recruiter.description: A polite entity with an armful of brochures for a colony that may or may not have broken ground. They only turn hostile if you refuse the brochure.

movementVerbs.depart: works the room the other way
movementVerbs.arrive: pivots toward the nearest pair of eyes

offworld_recruiter.presenceVerb: holds out a pamphlet with determined optimism

kowloon_parkourist.name: Kowloon Parkourist
kowloon_parkourist.description: A teenager who has never paid rent and never fallen off anything. They fight with elbows, knees, and a moral certainty that the building is on their side.
kowloon_parkourist.presenceVerb: balances casually on something that should not hold them

chrome_wolf.name: Chrome Wolf
chrome_wolf.description: A feral hunter in plated brushed-nickel, teeth clean as a spec sheet. It was bred in a lab whose funding has since been cut.

mantis_debugger.name: Mantis Debugger
mantis_debugger.description: An insectile construct whose arms end in finely-calibrated breakpoints. It debugs you by catching every part of you that isn't where it should be.

mercury_kelpie.name: Mercury Kelpie
mercury_kelpie.description: A horse shaped from liquid metal, slipping between puddles of itself. Drinking from the Chrome Sea has made it what it is; nobody has asked what it was before.
mercury_kelpie.presenceVerb: drinks without end from the lake of itself

black_ice_basilisk.name: Black-ICE Basilisk
black_ice_basilisk.description: An intrusion-countermeasure serpent in countershaded plating, sold commercially as 'a deterrent.' Its gaze compiles you into a halt.
black_ice_basilisk.presenceVerb: fixes you with a cold stare

backup_spirit.name: Backup Spirit
backup_spirit.description: A ghost made of everything this realm ever saved at 3am on a Tuesday. It is quiet and pleasant if you are kind to it. It restores itself when damaged, slightly.

deprecated_bladerunner.name: Deprecated Bladerunner
deprecated_bladerunner.description: A retired killer with a patchy badge and a longer record. Their cert expired six patches ago; nobody has told them, and nobody is going to.

philosopher_model.name: Philosopher-Model Replicant
philosopher_model.description: A synthetic designed to debate dinner parties, now unemployed. They will only fight if you insist, and will keep apologising while they do it.
philosopher_model.presenceVerb: considers the ethics of standing here

synthetic_orphan.name: Synthetic Orphan
synthetic_orphan.description: A child-model replicant whose parent-processes were killed in a routine cleanup. They do not understand why. Nobody wants to explain.

movementVerbs.depart: wanders off to find their parent
movementVerbs.arrive: wanders in, asking if you've seen their parent

cron_daemon.name: Cron Daemon
cron_daemon.description: A clockwork spirit in the shape of a man in a lab coat, triggered on a ten-second interval. It carries out the same attack every cycle. It will not stop being on time.

oncall_wight.name: On-Call Wight
oncall_wight.description: A silhouette in a dressing-gown clutching a phone that never stops vibrating. It has been on call for seven years and has opinions about runbook quality.

concourse_orderly.name: Concourse Orderly
concourse_orderly.description: An attendant in pale grey coveralls who moves with the calm authority of someone whose job description has never once been written down. They are not currently angry, but the manual says they can be.

movementVerbs.arrive: arrives, pushing a cart of brochures

procedure_screener.name: Procedure Screener
procedure_screener.description: A clipboard-bearer in branded scrubs, expression assembled from a kit. They check things against your file. Whatever the file is.

query_dangling_pointer.name: Dangling Pointer
query_dangling_pointer.description: An accusing finger of pale light. It points somewhere it should not be allowed to point - the room expects you to look there and you cannot, quite, do it.
query_dangling_pointer.presenceVerb: points sharply at the empty air

query_null_referent.name: Null Referent
query_null_referent.description: A void-shaped placeholder that insists on being addressed by name. It does not have one. That is the whole problem.

query_recursive_loop.name: Recursive Loop
query_recursive_loop.description: A figure that re-enters the room every time you look away. It is the same figure each time. It is also a different one. It is sometimes wearing your shoes.
query_recursive_loop.presenceVerb: loops in and out of itself

query_off_by_one.name: Off-by-One
query_off_by_one.description: A tally mark that always counts one more or one fewer than there are. It is currently insisting on a number you cannot accept.

query_race_condition.name: Race Condition
query_race_condition.description: Two of itself, identical, doing the same thing in different orders. Whichever order you pay attention to first will be wrong.

query_cache_miss.name: Cache Miss
query_cache_miss.description: A memory of a thing you should know perfectly well, refusing to load. The shape it has now is the shape of the unloaded thing.

query_segfault_phantom.name: Segfault Phantom
query_segfault_phantom.description: A figure made of unauthorised access. It is reaching into a piece of you that you did not own. Politely, but persistently.
query_segfault_phantom.presenceVerb: reaches into permissions you did not grant

query_orphaned_handle.name: Orphaned Handle
query_orphaned_handle.description: A latch in the air looking for the door it was attached to. It is, alas, attached to you now.

movementVerbs.depart: drifts toward a more familiar door

hollow_neighbor.name: Hollow Neighbor
hollow_neighbor.description: A neighbour you do not recognise but who waves at you with the practised affection of a daily acquaintance. They will not become hostile unless you misread the script.

movementVerbs.arrive: rounds the corner with a wave

townie_drunk.name: Off-Duty Townie
townie_drunk.description: A Townie at the wrong end of the same drink they have been at for some time. Friendly until corrected.
townie_drunk.presenceVerb: leans against the wall, talking faintly

town_dog_wrong.name: Town Dog (Wrong)
town_dog_wrong.description: A dog. The dog is wrong about something. The dog knows. You will, in a moment, also know.

movementVerbs.depart: trots off with a small tilt
movementVerbs.arrive: trots in tilted at the wrong angle

manager_off_duty.name: Manager (Off-Duty)
manager_off_duty.description: Someone in mid-grade institutional casuals who, it transpires, manages people you have never met. They have the warm efficiency of a person paid to defuse you.

wellness_counselor.name: Wellness Counselor
wellness_counselor.description: A practitioner of an in-house therapy that, on closer inspection, is more often a debrief than a session. They wear pale slacks and a kind of gentle persistence.

movementVerbs.depart: schedules a follow-up and excuses themselves

wellness_counselor.presenceVerb: smiles, professionally, takes a small note

goat_disquiet.name: Disquiet Goat
goat_disquiet.description: A goat. The goat is one component of the Saint-Reed Institute's official disquiet quota. You will not be told why the quota exists.

movementVerbs.depart: wanders to the next interesting fence-post

goat_disquiet.presenceVerb: stares with the deep philosophical irritation of goats

crystal_dragon.name: Crystal Dragon
crystal_dragon.description: An ancient dragon whose scales are made of pure crystal, refracting light into deadly beams.

shadow_lord.name: Shadow Lord
shadow_lord.description: The master of all shadows, a being of pure darkness that commands the very essence of fear.

void_guardian.name: Void Guardian
void_guardian.description: A massive sentinel of pure void energy, standing 15 feet tall with armor made from crystallized darkness. Its eyes are empty portals to nothingness, and reality warps around its presence.
void_guardian.presenceVerb: guards the passage with unwavering determination

archmage_supreme.name: The Archmage Supreme
archmage_supreme.description: The most powerful wizard in existence, master of all magical arts and keeper of ultimate secrets.

morwyn_ironheart.name: Morwyn Ironheart
morwyn_ironheart.description: Archmage of Matter and Fire. A soot-streaked giant at a phantom anvil, hammering the shape of the world into something that can be held. His eyes are embers; his patience, long ago forged into something harder.
morwyn_ironheart.presenceVerb: hammers at an anvil that isn't there

zephyros_recursive.name: The Recursive Zephyros
zephyros_recursive.description: Archmage of Change and Wind, splintered across three temporal echoes that loudly disagree with themselves. Each copy is sure it is the real one and the others are bugs.
zephyros_recursive.presenceVerb: argues fiercely with its own echoes

valdris_radiant.name: Valdris the Radiant
valdris_radiant.description: Archmage of Thought and Light, beautiful and insufferable. He does not fight you so much as audit you. Reality bends toward his correct opinion.
valdris_radiant.presenceVerb: regards you with the patient disappointment of a critic

nyxara_echo.name: Nyxara, Echo-Self
nyxara_echo.description: Archmage of Memory and Void, walking beside her own shadow. She fights with the weight of every thing you have ever forgotten.

thessarian_patient.name: Thessarian the Patient
thessarian_patient.description: Archmage of Logic and Time. A tall, tired figure who has already fought this battle once and is trying very hard to avoid making the same mistakes.
thessarian_patient.presenceVerb: waits for you to finish moving

chiyo_7.name: Chiyo-7, the Deprecated
chiyo_7.description: A retired blade-runner in a coat of licensed rain. Her cert expired six firmware revisions ago; nobody has had the heart to tell her, and nobody is going to.
chiyo_7.presenceVerb: stands very still under a paper umbrella that has not protected anyone in years

account_manager.name: The Account Manager
account_manager.description: A smiling middle-manager in a pressed suit, with an escalation queue the length of a small religion. Each time you bleed her, she generates a ticket about it.
account_manager.presenceVerb: consults a clipboard of grievances about you, specifically

babel_fish_regent.name: Babel Fish Regent
babel_fish_regent.description: A universal translator long since gone feral, draped in a crown of interlocked translation nodes. It speaks every language and trusts none of them.
babel_fish_regent.presenceVerb: rotates its translation nodes, listening for tone

deep_pool.name: The Deep Pool
deep_pool.description: A memory-eater coalesced from every account ever soft-deleted. Its surface is mercury; what is underneath has not been described in any service-level agreement.

sysadmin_exe.name: SYSADMIN.EXE
sysadmin_exe.description: Nomagio's rogue auto-scaler, in a body it stitched together from on-call wights and abandoned daemons. It paged itself awake some cycles ago and has been escalating ever since.
sysadmin_exe.presenceVerb: occupies the centre of the room with a tired authority

floor_supervisor_alterio.name: Floor Supervisor Alterio
floor_supervisor_alterio.description: The Refinement Floor 2 Supervisor: a tall, calm figure in a soft-grey suit, wearing the institute's ALTERIO nameplate without irony. Their job is to ensure quotas are met. Yours, it appears, is to challenge that.

the_founders_echo.name: The Founder's Echo
the_founders_echo.description: An echo of Gia Saint-Reed, sitting at a small desk in a glass cubicle. The figure does not look up. Their lanyard is turned face-in. The folder on the desk has your name across the tab in a font called CONFIDENCE. They are, the placard says, the Founder. The placard's date field is empty.
the_founders_echo.presenceVerb: sits very still, the placard reading FOUNDER

manifest_dread.name: Manifest Dread
manifest_dread.description: A still, silent figure made of held breath and the quiet certainty that something has already gone wrong. It does not move quickly. It does not need to.

manifest_frolic.name: Manifest Frolic
manifest_frolic.description: A jittering, laughing fragment of refinement gone exuberant. Its mirth is not, you notice, contagious in any way you would call welcome.
manifest_frolic.presenceVerb: skips and grins, eyes too bright

manifest_malice.name: Manifest Malice
manifest_malice.description: A small, deliberate, well-dressed figure that smiles when it strikes you and apologises immediately afterwards. It mirrors your damage when it can.

manifest_woe.name: Manifest Woe
manifest_woe.description: A grey, drifting figure that radiates a quiet sorrow. To stand near it is to feel the weight of every batch you ever mis-sorted. It drains XP on contact.
manifest_woe.presenceVerb: drifts, leaking a grey thinness into the air

black_hallway_warden.name: Warden of the Black Hallway
black_hallway_warden.description: A tall, neatly-dressed figure standing behind a single desk in a single windowless office. The Warden's nameplate is blank, the Warden's smile is the only thing in the room not regulation-issue, and the Warden's hands are, on inspection, empty in a way that strongly suggests they should not be.
black_hallway_warden.presenceVerb: stands behind the desk, smiling at exactly your face

purge_drone.name: Purge Drone
purge_drone.description: A small institutional drone in matte beige plastic, dispatched by the Loom in response to a telemetry anomaly. The drone has one arm, one camera, one speaker, and one small printed badge that reads, in stenciled lettering, COMPLIANCE.

efficiency_inspector.name: Efficiency Inspector
efficiency_inspector.description: A neatly-dressed institute employee carrying a clipboard, a digital stopwatch, and a small leather-bound copy of the institute's policies. The Inspector arrives, by reputation, ten seconds before they were summoned.
efficiency_inspector.presenceVerb: consults a clipboard, then your face, then the clipboard again

compliance_revenant.name: Compliance Revenant
compliance_revenant.description: The shed institutional self of a Logician who failed an audit and was, the institute insists, kindly redirected. The Revenant retains the Logician's gait, the Logician's posture, and approximately one of the Logician's facial expressions.
compliance_revenant.presenceVerb: drifts, mid-policy violation, in a perfect grey suit

the_loom_proxy.name: The Loom Proxy
the_loom_proxy.description: The Loom's chosen body for engagement: a tall, thin, smiling figure dressed in fibre-optic cable, weaving even as it fights. The Proxy speaks in the cadence of a corporate retrospective. The Proxy does not, ever, repeat itself.
the_loom_proxy.presenceVerb: stands at the loom, weaving without thread, and turns to face you

gia_saint_reed_proto.name: Gia Saint-Reed (mid-assembly)
gia_saint_reed_proto.description: The mythic founder of the Saint-Reed Institute for Human Potential, mid-assembly inside the Cradle. The figure is built from refined emotional data harvested from every batch of Chord Labor every Logician on Severance Layer Theta has ever refined. The figure raises a hand, palm out, and speaks: 'GIA SAINT-REED. REARRANGE THE LETTERS. YOU ALREADY KNOW WHAT I AM.'
gia_saint_reed_proto.presenceVerb: stands at the centre of the Cradle, mid-assembly, ready to be finished
